_comment: FREEDOM_PHYSICS (BACKLOG #52) -- Zelda-style interactable/dynamic world props. kind: pushable|breakable|throwable|liftable|climbable|hidden_switch. mass in prop units; break_loot references a data/loot_tables.json table id (guarded -- unknown tables just drop nothing); size = collision/visual half-extent px; color = placeholder body tint until Fable art lands (art requested via prop_visual_requested). hp only meaningful for breakable/throwable. All bodies are built in code -- no scene/asset dependency.

clay_pot.desc: A Vetka clay pot -- shatters for a scrap of loot (Zelda pots).

grass_tuft.desc: Cuttable grass -- a blade-swing scatters it (and it burns).

wood_crate.desc: A shove-a-tile crate -- block a lane, weigh a plate, or smash it.

grain_sack.desc: A soft sack of grain -- pushes easy, muffles a fall.

ale_barrel.desc: A heavy barrel -- leans when shoved, splinters when broken.

boulder.desc: A block-or-shove boulder -- takes deliberate weight to move, seals or opens a way.

round_stone.desc: A liftable throwing-stone -- pick up and hurl at a switch or a skull.

skull_vase.desc: A grave-vase -- lift, throw, and it breaks where it lands.

lift_slab.desc: A heave-able flagstone -- lift it to reveal what a strong back was meant to hide.

climb_ladder.desc: A climb route (2D = a walkable shortcut node) -- never a wall, always a way up.

climb_vines.desc: Hanging vines -- a green ladder up a cliff face; fire clears them.

rune_switch.desc: A concealed floor-rune -- stand on it (or drop a weight) and it answers.

pressure_plate.desc: A weighted plate -- a crate or a boot holds it down; lift the weight and it resets.
